description: DevZero is a Kubernetes optimization platform focused on reducing cloud infrastructure costs through workload rightsizing, node autoscaling, network cost analysis, and security scanning. It connects to Kubernetes clusters with operators and lets teams manage platform resources through infrastructure-as-code providers.
summary: DevZero publicly documents two developer integration surfaces: a Terraform provider and a Pulumi provider, both backed by the DevZero API at `https://dakr.devzero.io` and authenticated with a personal access token plus team ID.
